# Obstetric Admission Template
Copy and paste this template to quickly generate a routine ob/gyn admission or labor note.

```text
pt []F wt[]
obs g[]p[]l[] ga[]w edd[]
alg nil
cc routine admission / labor pains
hpi 
pmh nil
sx labor_pains+ bleeding- leaking- fetal_movements_normal+
vitals bp120/80 hr85 spo299 temp98.6 rr16
pe general:pallor- pedal_edema-
pe abd:uterus_term cephalic fhs_good contractions+
pe pv:[]
ix hb[] wbc[] plt[]
ix usg:[]
dx Term Gestation in Active Labor
```
